Andrew L. Satenberg, Esq. (Court Call), Manatt, Phelps & Phillips (310) 312-4000, Moving Party Defendants Navigant International Southwest, Inc. and Navigant International, Inc.
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANTS NAVIGANT INTERNATIONAL SOUTHWEST,INC. and NAVIGANT INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S Motion To Admit Holli D. Colburn As Counsel Pro Hac Vice: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Proposed order to be submitted. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-05-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
COURTROOM APPEARANCES:
Robert D. Poore, Esq. of BJORK LAWRENCE 510/832-8134, moving for BJORK LAWRENCE for withdrawal of attorney of record for PLAINTIFFS JANINA DOWLING and NINA TAIRA

COURTCALL APPEARANCE:
Andrew L. Satenberg, Esq. of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips (L.A.) 310/312-4000, for Defendant Navigant International, Inc., did not oppose the motion

RULING:
Upon representation of both counsel, the Court granted BJORK LAWRENCE'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS JANINA DOWLING and NINA TAIRA. Counsel for plaintiffs is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/JU) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
